the highlighted section is: gobi desert

the gobi desert is one of the most famous tourist attractions in mongolia. it is a large desert that covers parts of northern and central mongolia. the gobi desert is known for its unique landscapes, including sand dunes, rocky mountains, and ancient ruins. it is also home to a variety of wildlife, including the elusive snow leopard and the rare goitered gazelle. the gobi desert is a popular destination for adventure seekers and nature lovers. other famous tourist attractions in mongolia include the capital city of ulan bator, the sacred mountain of orkhon, and the historical sites of the mongol empire.
